action.description: Promote proto-conscience-policy from policy to constitutional article (Article 12)

anticipated_harms.description: Constitutional articles are append-only — once promoted, the conscience framework becomes nearly immutable even if flawed
anticipated_harms.mitigation: Ensure the policy has been validated through at least 3 PDCA cycles before promotion. Document escape hatches.

undecidable_aspects: Whether the current conscience model is the right one for all future scenarios
Whether constitutional immutability helps or hinders governance evolution
logotron_check.metalanguage_risk: This action modifies the governance framework that authorizes governance modifications. Self-referential — Gödel's incompleteness applies directly.
